recommendations.likely_source_type: Official County Registrar or Secretary of State
recommendations.search_keywords: [County Name] statement of vote results csv xlsx
actionable_steps: Check your county Registrar of Voters website for past election results.
Look for 'Statement of Vote' (SOV) download links.
Prefer machine-readable formats like CSV or Excel over PDFs.
recommendations.why_needed: Essential for establishing baseline precinct model turning and calibrating assumptions.

recommendations.likely_source_type: County Registrar or Third-Party Data Vendor
actionable_steps: Official voter files usually require formal application or purchase through the state.
Alternatively, export an active voter list from a partisan platform (VAN, PDI, L2).
Be extremely cautious downloading PII online.
recommendations.why_needed: Required for building the initial targeting universe and simulating specific voter turnout scores.

recommendations.search_keywords: [County Name] open data portal voting precinct shapefile
actionable_steps: Search the county GIS portal (often powered by ArcGIS Hub).
Download exactly one single shapefile (.zip) or geojson format.
recommendations.why_needed: Necessary for generating the interactive map dashboard and cutting field canvassing turfs.

recommendations.search_keywords: [State Name] statewide database block to precinct crosswalk
actionable_steps: Search for block-to-precinct mapping tables, often provided by state legislative redistricting commissions.
recommendations.why_needed: Provides block-to-precinct mapping so geographic allocation is more accurate.

recommendations.likely_source_type: Campaign Internal Drive or Public Poll Repositories
recommendations.search_keywords: [Contest Name] latest poll cross-tabs pdf csv
actionable_steps: Check internal campaign strategy files or Google Drive folders.
For public polls, search sites like RealClearPolitics or FiveThirtyEight.
You only need high-level toplines for Campaign In A Box (Support / Oppose / Undecided).
recommendations.why_needed: Crucial external signal for the Intelligence Fusion layer. Without it, the model relies on baselines only.

actionable_steps: During the 30-day early voting window, registrars usually post daily aggregate PDFs/CSV.
Also check partisan resources like Political Data Intelligence (PDI) tracking pages.
recommendations.why_needed: Allows the war room to project early voting pace and adjust GOTV targets daily.

recommendations.likely_source_type: US Census Bureau / American Community Survey
recommendations.search_keywords: Census ACS 5-year estimate [County Name] education income data
actionable_steps: Search for Table S1501 (Educational Attainment) or S1901 (Income).
recommendations.why_needed: Can adjust support models (via education/income indexes) if polling is sparse.
